title: Yet Another FNAF Mod
description: A vanilla-styled FNAF mod with cutesy animatronics!
body:
## This mod requires Geckolib to play!

HEY!! YOU HAVE FULL PERMISSION TO MAKE VIDEOS/SERIES WITH THIS MOD, ACTUALLY, I ENCOURAGE YOU!! And if you make one, comment the link so I can watch it!

![DESCRIPTION](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Yet_Another_FNAF_Mod/BH_Yet_Another_FNAF_Mod_description.webp)

Yet Another FNAF Mod adds brand new blocks, structures and mobs from Five Nights at Freddy's (1-6 + others at the moment.) This mod requires Geckolib to play and will not work without it.

This mod adds several function blocks, including:

Generator

  - This block emits redstone and can be connected to certain devices, however it starts to run out of energy during the night time (The max energy can be modified in a gamerule.)

Security Door

  -  This door can be connected to a generator to close it, however it drains energy.

Flashbeacon

  - When this block is right-clicked it starts emitting light that makes certain critters be warded off!

Music Box

  - During the night, this prop starts playing music and The Puppet is lured to it, make sure to wind it up though!

Audio Lure

  - When this block is activated by redstone it plays a sound which lures in Springtrap, however, it breaks under certain conditions!

Clocks

- When you right click a clock, it tells you the time, however certain clocks with play a melody when it hits midnight (Plays a bit before tick 18000) and when it hits 6 AM (Plays a bit before tick 0)!

Fusebox

- This is a block that emits redstone, but can be deactivated by certain animatronics

Linked Lamp, Shock Infuser and Control Panel.

- The control panel can be linked to the Linked Lamp and the Shock Infuser using the Faz-Wrench, and both the Linked Lamp and Shock Infuser require redstone power to function.

Scooper

- Can damage entities in front of it using redstone.
- If you scoop the main 4 funtimes you get a surprise :)

Work Monitor (Work In Progress function)

- Can be turned on and linked to Audio Lures
- Ocasionally plays ads, which you turn off using the TV remote.
- Certain beavers may force ads on it.

![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Yet_Another_FNAF_Mod/BH_Yet_Another_FNAF_Mod_faq.webp)

**Q1**. Is this coming to bedrock/fabric?

A1. No plans for Bedrock or Fabric are set for now.

**Q2**. Can you port to X version?

A2. Currently, plans are to stay in 1.20.1, however with certain conditions, this will change.

**Q3**. Can I use this mod in a video/build?

A3. YES!! And please show us! We would love to see those.

**Q4**. When is the next update?

A4. When it's ready :)

**Q5**. When are you adding things from X game?

A5. We have a roadmap which we plan to share soon in the discord server, however Security Breach, Ruin and Tales of the Pizzaplex are all planned for its own update.

**Q6**. How do I use the neon letters?

A6. Change the FAT into the red mode, right click the air, choose a letter, then right click one of the neon letter blocks.

## CREDITS

DT - Some block textures and mob textures

Meph - Some models, also general support

Stephan - fox bug tester

Ponderkitten - Secondary programmer

ThunderingStatic - inspiration for a few props

cherrytonic - Artist behind these cool page graphics!

someonecalledragnarok - Animations for Pitbonnie, and the Graveyard Shift animatronics!
